title: Apex vs TPT (2026): Pick Your Trail Once vs Pick It Three Times
description: Apex 4.0 vs Take Profit Trader — identical $3K trailing drawdown on 100K, but Apex picks your trail mechanic once at purchase while TPT switches it three times across the lifecycle. Plus the SB+$100 vs SB lock-floor split. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: Apex vs TPT (2026): Pick Your Trail Once vs Pick It Three Times
og.description: Same $3K DD on 100K. Same Test/Eval-only consistency drop. But Apex locks the trail mechanic at purchase for the life of the account, while TPT auto-shifts EOD → intraday → EOD across Test → PRO → PRO+. The governance is the story.
